form.formComment: At the latest run 12th of 14 at Deauville on April 8 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Saint Laurent carrying 56.5kg at $19. The run before that ran on from midfield and won by 0.8 len at Le Mans March 20 over 1950m on a rain affected track defeating Kamikaze with 53kg at $5.20. Among the winning chances.

form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 10 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 2100m, on a slow track; 29 len behind Damabiah Angel with 56kg at $8.10. The start before that 5th of 8 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 11 over 2150m, in the wet; 17 len behind The Fist carrying 57.5kg at $7. No threat last start but is capable of better.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at Moulins April 9 over 2400m on a rain affected track defeating Simplythebest with 58kg at $6.80. Before that won by 2.5 len at Lyon-la-Soie March 21 over 2400m defeating Red Moon carrying 56kg at $4.40. This is well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fourth of 9 at Pau All Weather February 3 over 2000m, 5.5 len behind Markos carrying 58.5kg at $5.30. At her first start won by 2.5 len Tarbes October 12 over 1500m defeating Maeva's Star with 58kg. Definite winning hope.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by a long-neck at Lyon-la-Soie March 21 over 1800m defeating Asprila carrying 55.5kg at $8.30. The start before that faded in the straight 5th of 16 at Pornichet on February 18 over 2100m, 5.5 len behind Reveur carrying 55kg at $8.60. Big chance again now that the penny has dropped.

form.formComment: Last start second last in a small field at Machecoul on April 6 over 1650m, on a slow track; 11 len behind Deal with 58kg. The run before that raced on the pace before fading 11th of 16 at Fontainebleau on March 13 over 1800m, on a slow track; 16 len behind Victoria Secret carrying 53.5kg at $38. Better than that recent ordinary performance suggests.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 46-day let-up. First-up after four months 10th of 14 at Fontainebleau on February 28 over 2200m, on a slow track; 16 len behind Sheeran with 58kg at $113. Previously second-up ran last of 11 at Compiegne on September 16 over 1800m, on a slow track; 31 len behind Artilleur carrying 56.5kg at $103. Needs more time.
